parsed_review.summary: CP00-815 (RP26.P07.M05.S21-S30, risk A, 10 units, micro "Permission And Audit Binding") is a clean descriptor-only closeout-handoff continuation of CP00-814 and its descriptor-verified production_ready claim is well-supported. Verification (read-only via Read/Grep/Glob): (1) ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP815_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:511) matches manifest/baseline/contract (pack_id CP00-815, risk A, 10 units, range S21-S30, upstream CP00-814, next CP00-816/RP26.P07.M06.S01, flag enterprise_saas_failure_recovery_permission_audit_closeout_handoff_descriptor_verified). (2) ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP815_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:2327) uses FAILURE_RECOVERY_CLOSEOUT_HANDOFF_ROWS (registry.js:835); the 10 handoff titles exactly match the manifest included-unit titles in order, and deliverable_counts {claude_review:1, implementation:9} match the prompt distribution and the coverage test (model.test.js:1173-1182). (3) No-write/no-real-data is enforced at multiple layers: createCaseSet (service.js:306) hard-codes descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false and all payload flags false; ROW_EXTRAS (service.js:290-303) add only further false guards (claude read_only, no claude final approval, no enterprise_trust_claimed, no silent success, no real_tenant_data_loaded, no permission/audit detail, no correction_runtime_executed, no writes_product_state); validateDescriptor (validators.js:190-253) rejects any runtime/leak/permission-eval/audit-write/secret/cross-tenant/UI-API/real-data/enterprise-trust flag; NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:528) confirms. (4) authority_boundary (service.js:1937) sets claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; claude_packet read_only=true. (5) Hermes is used only for a descriptor-only evidence packet (receipt_shape descriptor_only_enterprise_saas_no_write, emits_runtime_receipt=false tested at model.test.js:1199), not product runtime (hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false). (6) Tests (model.test.js:1173-1242) assert binding/coverage, runtime-closed handoff rows, source_descriptor chain to CP00-814, authority boundary, hermes/claude read-only and non-final-approval, and contract promotion to CP00-815 with prior packs (incl. CP00-814) historical; contract validation.valid=true (line 45909); validate-rp26 script bound to CP815 with manifest-snapshot fallback; live cursor (next-pack-queue.json) live_latest_pack_id=CP00-814 / live_next_unit_id=RP26.P07.M05.S21 confirms CP00-815 is the current pack; mandatory artifacts packages/enterprise/src/sso.js and scim.js exist. (7) Review-evidence hardening (CP178+) satisfied: auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1434-byte valid-JSON stdout per readiness-report.json), manifest valid_review_receipts=[] and invalid_review_attempts=[] (no malformed prior evidence); manifest production_ready=false/runtime_ready=false with no runtime or enterprise-trust overclaim. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer, not final approver; that human/enterprise-trust authority boundary is expected and outside this receipt, so it does not block this CP closeout goal. Pre-closeout absence of command-evidence.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, and claude-review-result.json is expected (generated at/after this review). Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook/docx/launch docs, new-session-handoff.md) are correctly preserved outside scope and active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty, so nothing in-scope is hidden. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
